dsl_rule.translation_notes: Signal specifies 'trend has just turned up' based on moving average. Interpreted as price crossing above a moving average (likely sma_20 as a standard trend indicator). Exit condition 'AUTHOR_SILENT' converted to reasonable reversal: price crossing below the same moving average. No explicit stop loss or hold period specified in original signal.

backtest_rule.reason: Signal specifies 'trend has just turned up' based on moving average. Interpreted as price crossing above a moving average (likely sma_20 as a standard trend indicator). Exit condition 'AUTHOR_SILENT' converted to reasonable reversal: price crossing below the same moving average. No explicit stop loss or hold period specified in original signal.

source_rule_text: When the trend has just turned up based on a moving average, enter a long position with 1 contract.
